mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM material WHERE status = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material (code, name, spec, unit, alert_threshold, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{spec}, #{unit}, #{alertThreshold}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE material SET code=#{code}, name=#{name}, spec=#{spec}, unit=#{unit}, alert_threshold=#{alertThreshold} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE material SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
